div.div: Stage 2: Informal pipeline (no deliberation) · Stage 3: Deliberation council (coordinator + specialists, proposals to human) · Stage 4: Domain councils + Meta-Council · Stage 5: Self-constituting (harness-assembled from registry) · Stage 6: Environment stewards
